chunks.title: Nehemiah Receives News and Weeps
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction describing the arrival of Hanani and Nehemiah's emotional response.

chunks.title: Nehemiah's Prayer of Confession
chunks.reason: A continuous prayer where Nehemiah confesses sins and appeals to God's covenant.

chunks.title: Nehemiah's Request for Favor
chunks.reason: The conclusion of the prayer asking for success before the king.
